title: AN ACT DECLARING THE SEVENTH (7TH) DAY OF JANUARY OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY FOR THE PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, TO BE KNOWN AS "ARAW NG CAMIGUIN"

chunks.text:
h. No. 6581 / 97 OG NO. 18,46 Supp. (Apr.30, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9094, April 08, 2001 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE SEVENTH (7TH) DAY OF JANUARY OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY FOR THE PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN, TO BE KNOWN AS "ARAW NG CAMIGUIN"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. January seven of every year is hereby declared as a special working public holiday in the Province of Camiguin to commemorate its charter day anniversary.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL, JR.

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE

, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the

House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 6, 2001 and October 2, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 08, 2001

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
